name: AI Controls Matrix
description: Early-draft snapshot of CSA's AI Controls Matrix. AICM evolved through 0.0.x/0.9.x drafts into the 1.0 release. v0.0.2 reflects the early control taxonomy as the AICM working group was still iterating on domain structure.
relationToCloudSecurity: Pre-release draft; CSA AICM 1.0 is the stable controls-mapping target for cloud-AI workloads.
relationToAISecurity: Early-stage draft. Use 1.0.3 for current AI control assessments.

license.notes: CSA publications are typically released under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0. Confirm specific document license on download page.

current_extraction.notes: Early-draft control set, structured into per-domain CSV/JSON.

notes: Historical draft of AICM. Use 1.0.3 for current work.
